title: Sweet Itch Free 500ml All-Natural Horse Skin Care Lotion – Soothes Irritated Skin, Reduces Itching & Supports Hair Regrowth – Sweet Itch Ointment with Benzyl Benzoate
features: Gentle, all-natural horse skin lotion – Formulated with calming and protective ingredients to help soothe irritated and itchy skin caused by biting insects and environmental irritation.
Reduces itching and supports comfort – Helps calm persistent irritation and discomfort, encouraging a more settled horse throughout fly season and warm weather.
Supports hair regrowth & smoother skin – Designed to help soften hardened or dry areas and encourage hair regrowth where rubbing may have occurred.

Contains Benzyl Benzoate for targeted seasonal support – Includes Benzyl Benzoate, a widely used ingredient known for helping deter insects and support skin comfort for horses prone to irritation from insect exposure.

Fast-acting comfort for irritated skin – Quickly absorbs into the skin to help calm irritation and reduce rubbing, supporting noticeable comfort soon after application without leaving a heavy or greasy residue.
description: Sweet Itch Free 500ml is a premium, all-natural horse skin care lotion designed to help soothe irritated skin, reduce itching caused by biting insects, and support smoother, healthier hair regrowth. Ideal for use during warmer months or when horses are prone to rubbing and discomfort, this gentle yet effective formula helps calm sensitive skin and improve overall comfort. Sweet Itch Free contains a carefully balanced blend of skin-supporting ingredients, including calamine and zinc oxide to help soothe and protect irritated areas, along with nourishing carrier oils to moisturise dry or damaged skin and support the natural skin barrier. The formula also includes benzyl benzoate, a widely used ingredient known for helping deter insects and reduce skin irritation associated with insect exposure, making it suitable for ongoing seasonal skin care. Made with skin-friendly ingredients and suitable for regular use, Sweet Itch Free is a trusted choice for horse owners looking to maintain comfortable skin and a healthy coat.
